origins.name: Fresh Arrival
origins.blurb: You stepped off the Dragon Express with two bags and an address that turned out not to exist.

origins.name: Laid-off Doorman
origins.blurb: Eighteen years holding the door for people who never learned your name. The building went private-grid and so did your job.

origins.name: Defrocked Priest of a New Faith
origins.blurb: You heard the signal too. Then you heard yourself explaining the donations, and the Receivers heard that.

origins.name: Drone-League Washout
origins.blurb: One crash too many — the drone's, then the career's. Your hands still twitch at 400 simulated knots.

origins.name: Night Courier
origins.blurb: You carry things between people who don't meet. You don't ask what. The not-asking is most of the wage.

origins.name: Clinic Dropout
origins.blurb: Two years from a license when the hospital system cracked. Now you stitch people in kitchens and get paid in whatever's lying around.
